title: DMOW-053 Piss Punishment 3 Yui Aikawa
overview: There is a company that reflects the social conditions that have become a female-dominant society. Useless employees who can't work are strongly punished by drinking urine, telling new employees about the company's policy in a urine interview, and returning salespeople who want a contract with urine blame! She's usually a soft-spoken female president, but when it comes to work, she forgets herself and throws a strict and obscene piss at her work! [* There is some disturbance in the image and sound]
